{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dylian Basin
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dylian Basin]] is a location.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
